dispensaries.name: Cookies on Camelback
dispensaries.note: DEACTIVATED: not a real dispensary menu. cookies.co is the national brand site (expired TLS cert, no orderable AZ menu) and there is no 'Cookies on Camelback' storefront. The only AZ Cookies dispensary is Cookies Tempe, already covered by the 'Cookies - Tempe' Leafly entry. CookiesAdapter (Shopify /products.json) remains registered for any future Shopify dispensary menu.

dispensaries.name: TruMed

dispensaries.name: Curaleaf - Camelback (WM)
dispensaries.addr: 1040 E Camelback Rd Suite A, Phoenix, AZ 85014
dispensaries.note: Curaleaf runs its own headless menu (curaleaf.com/shop) with no public adapter, and its catalog is almost entirely house brands (Curaleaf/Select) that aren't on the top-shelf allowlist. A Weedmaps mirror exists, but the allowlisted top-shelf coverage is already provided by the 'Curaleaf - Camelback' Leafly entry. Left inactive to avoid a duplicate physical store; flip active+Weedmaps if house brands are later allowlisted.

dispensaries.name: Trulieve - Phoenix Alhambra
dispensaries.addr: 2630 W Indian School Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85017
dispensaries.note: Trulieve/Harvest Alhambra. Live-verified via DutchieAdapter: 198 items / 68 flower. Added on platform 'Dutchie' (cName urban-green-house) because this store's trulieve.com page embeds a short base62 Dutchie retailer id (FPr47JWuB7N4Hr3oN) that the TrulieveAdapter's 24-hex resolver can't match; the underlying Dutchie storefront verifies directly.

dispensaries.name: Sol Flower - Tempe University
dispensaries.note: Live-verified via ProprietaryAdapter (JointCommerce httpx, no browser): 300 items / 30 flower, businessId 5800 from livewithsol.com's window.jointEcommerce store map. Sol Flower runs JointCommerce (not Dutchie). The 'Deer Valley' location advertised on the marketing site is NOT in the live ordering config (no businessId / no online menu), so it was not added.

dispensaries.name: Nature's Medicines - Phoenix
dispensaries.note: SKIPPED (no online menu to scrape). The AZ entity (naturemedaz.com) is Cloudflare-gated and its listings are 'in-store purchases only'; the corporate Dutchie-Plus site (naturesmedicines.com) no longer carries AZ stores, and no Dutchie/Weedmaps slug resolves to a live menu. Left inactive with this note rather than the earlier (incorrect) 'not on Leafly' reason.
